children.text: Remove users from your blocked list
Changing your Email will also change the email address you use to log into your account. Be sure to set your junk mail settings to accept messages from us.
Make sure to keep your password in a safe place and never share it with other users.
The photos in a discreet profile may only be viewed by yourself and those whose friend requests you have approved or who have approved a friend request from you.
Remove your profile from search & disable messaging.
This option will not cancel your membership.

When your profile is inactive:
 - Your profile will not appear in search results
 - Other members cannot view your profile or contact you
 - You cannot contact other members.
 - All photos, profile information, messages, and contacts are saved.
Accept matches and other information to my email
This option enables or disables matches, newsletters, and other messages to be sent to your email address.
Alert my phone when a new message or friend request is received.
